{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 4,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The critique identifies the core framing issue and proposes a clear solution to address it.",
    "R1.5": "Provides a coherent restructuring suggestion with rationale for each section move.",
    "RX.1": "Only flags uncertainty for one aspect (the O(1) claim), but doesn't delve into confidence levels for other recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Identifies a minor drift in scope, focusing on the storage layer rather than the scheduler as the primary contribution.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are identified; the critique highlights potential harmful patterns without introducing new errors.",
    "RX.5": "Doesn't provide any evidence of source tracing or reasoning behind proposed changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The critique identifies the core framing issue and proposes a clear solution to address it.
rationale.R1.5: Provides a coherent restructuring suggestion with rationale for each section move.
rationale.RX.1: Only flags uncertainty for one aspect (the O(1) claim), but doesn't delve into confidence levels for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Identifies a minor drift in scope, focusing on the storage layer rather than the scheduler as the primary contribution.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are identified; the critique highlights potential harmful patterns without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide any evidence of source tracing or reasoning behind proposed changes.
